series_metadata.series_title: Supreme Court of Ohio: Motion, Entry, a
series_metadata.series_description: This form, prescribed by the Ohio Public Defender (OPD-E-1031), is used to document Supreme Court indigent representation appointments, hours, and expenses for purposes of obtaining reimbursement from the State.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain current fiscal year plus next most recent fiscal year on-site. Remove older records to off-site storage for two years, then destroy provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released. Forms for death penalty cases are to be retained for 100 years., Paper: Shred
